new_text: Statusline cross-session state leak: _load_session_state() loads most-recent state file without session_id awareness; git branch cached to shared /tmp/statusline-git-cache (not session-specific). Vulnerable fields: git branch, error counts, verification ratio, test stats, session age. When Session A and B run back-to-back, B gets A's state. Root cause: statusline never calls state_file_for(session_id). Fix: add session_id param to _load_session_state() and get_git_branch().

Statusline v3 added framework health bar (HP:[████░]85%). 6 health dimensions: gates present (25%), hooks registered (20%), memory accessible (15%), skills present (15%), core files exist (15%), error pressure (10%). Uses Unicode bars (U+2588 filled, U+2591 empty). When adding gates/skills/hooks, update EXPECTED_GATES/EXPECTED_SKILLS/EXPECTED_HOOK_EVENTS. Full format: HP:[█████]100% | shf | G:12 | M:216 | CTX:34% | 247k tok | 12.5k>3.8k | 30min | +5017/-670 | $2.47. 486→493 tests.

Session 152: Web Dashboard Enhancement + Terminal Chat (4 phases). Added /api/statusline-snapshot (git branch enrichment), POST /api/toggles/{key} (11-key whitelist, atomic write), SSE live_state_event tracking, WebSocket chat with claude subprocess per message. Frontend: statusline metrics, toggles panel, terminal chat panel. New files: statusline.js, toggles.js, chat.js. Modified: server.py, index.html, style.css, main.js, sse.js. 1116/1116 tests passing. Dashboard localhost only.

TRv1 governance program tests expanded (2026-02-20): 34 new tests across 3 files, total now 68. error.rs (6): discriminant stability, FromPrimitive round-trip for 28 variants, unknown discriminant, Display messages. instruction.rs (19): bincode round-trip for 8 instruction types, 6 ProposalTypes, 4 Vote variants, title edge cases. processor.rs (9): effective_pass_threshold for 6 ProposalTypes (EmergencyUnlock always 8000 BPS), program_id non-zero. Run: cargo test -p trv1-governance-program --features agave-unstable-api

Rich Context Snapshot for Sub-Agents IMPLEMENTED (Session 24). Enhanced subagent_context.py (86→230 lines) to inject operational state from state_{session_id}.json at spawn time. Added 5 formatting helpers + per-agent-type budgets (Explore/Plan ~400 chars, general ~1200, Bash ~200, Unknown ~300). Fail-open: missing state falls back to minimal. 26 new tests added (413→439 total).

Session isolation fix for statusline + wrap-up (refactor-test branch): (1) _load_session_state() now accepts session_id, loads state_{session_id}.json directly. (2) get_git_branch() uses /tmp/statusline-git-cache-{session_id}. (3) SKILL.md Step 3 writes to {project_dir}/.claude-state.json for project sessions instead of ~/.claude/LIVE_STATE.json. (4) gather.py: added _get_state_file() using detect_project().

Session 4 Summary (2026-02-09): P1 Hardening of ProjectDawn Agave Fork completed. 4-agent team: stake-tester (8 tests + u128 penalty fix), flags-tester (6 tests + tier bounds fix), snapshot-fix (ProjectDawnConfig persistence), constants-fix (tier dedup + saturating_add). All passed. Total: 14 new tests + 4 code fixes. P0+P1: 5 guards + feature gate + CLI + 6 tests + 4 fixes + snapshot. Remaining P2: integration tests, governance unlock, testnet scripts.

TRv1 RPC key findings: bank APIs (get_account, vote_accounts, epoch, slot, block_height, capitalization, trv1_block_fee_state). BlockFeeState has base_fee_per_cu, gas metrics. Program IDs: TREASURY, GOVERNANCE, PASSIVE_STAKE, DEVELOPER_REWARDS (all hardcoded pubkeys). Discriminators: TreasuryState=0x54, GovernanceConfig=1, Proposal=2, PassiveStakeAccount=1. VoteStateView methods: node_pubkey, commission, last_voted_slot, root_slot. ActiveValidatorSet::compute() available.

TRv1 Deep Research Complete (Session 159). 13 findings: (1) 3 missing program dirs (developer-rewards, governance, treasury) in workspace. (2) Float arithmetic non-determinism in fee_distribution.rs. (3) Passive-stake not registered. (4) Slashing in-memory only. (5) Active set not enforced. (6) All 15 RPC methods unimplemented. (7) Treasury fees burn. (8) CI gated by anza-xyz check. (9) No cargo test in CI. (10) 2 trivial fee tests. (11) EIP-1559 not called. (12) BFT complete but unwired. (13) Monitoring metrics no HTTP server.

5 E2E verification tests added to projectdawn_permanent.rs (2026-02-09): (1) Multi-epoch non-compounding: bonus always 20% each epoch. (2) Capitalization accounting: bonus in inflation. (3) Multiple locked stakes: each earns 120% independently. (4) Zero reward epoch: no panic/changes, resumes next epoch. (5) EpochRewards sysvar consistency: slot-by-slot tracking. Added DualStakeSetup helper. Key fix: continuous fill_epoch_with_votes avoids TowerSync slot-gap failures. Total tests: 11. All pass.

Early unlock penalty redesign (eclipse-agave #7, 2026-03-03). OLD: penalty = stake × rate_bp × 5 / 10k. NEW: penalty = rewards_earned + (original_stake × tier_penalty_bp / 10k). Key: delegation.stake never modified by rewards (rewards added as extra lamports). Tier penalties: Tier 1 (no lock)=0, Tier 2 (30d)=250 BPS, Tier 3 (90d)=500 BPS, Tier 4 (180d)=750 BPS, Tier 5 (360d)=1250 BPS. Changed: stake_state.rs, projectdawn_config.rs. Uncommitted.

torus-github repo documentation audit (2026-02-26): No README.md at root. Critical gaps: ARCHITECTURE.md (559 lines, good), USAGE_GUIDE.md (486 lines), config.example.json/mcp.example.json (raw JSON, zero instructions), no install.sh, no getting-started, no Python setup guide (only 3 deps: lancedb, pyarrow, mcp), no ChromaDB/ramdisk instructions (setup_ramdisk.sh exists but undocumented), MCP config hardcodes $HOME. settings.json is live file (no settings.example.json). sync.sh reveals tool is personal-to-github export.

Session wrap-up (2026-03-02): torus-web Design v2.1 complete across two branches. Design-v2.1 (385f701): full overlay + API re-wiring + button text fix. v0-new-design (d477d84): layered approach. Both: AI Gateway page, AI tab on profile, pool card, navbar links, CSS animations (textDissolve, textReform, a-hole), font switcher (Orbitron, Iceland, Marvel, Ysabeau SC, Calibri). Fixed buttons (Verify Identity, Connect X, Connect Steam) text size. Both pushed.

Design v2.1 applied to torus-web across two branches (2026-03-02). Design-v2.1: Copied mockups over functional code, re-wired ALL APIs (b0648e9). Lesson: don't overwrite functional code. v0-new-design (better): Layered visual diffs on functional code, 6 files, 531 additions (d477d84). Added AI Gateway page, profile AI tab, pool card, animations, font switcher. Build fix: added missing ai-gateway-dashboard.tsx. Key lesson: layer design on functional, never replace.

Session 334 (torus-web): 3-branch comparison + Design-v2.1 fixes. Fixes: font-switcher.tsx check symbol (041e7cc), torus-energy-button.tsx disabled state (041e7cc), steam-connection.tsx button text size (f739834). Design-v2.1 now 16/16 features. feat/ai-api-gateway 10/16. v0-new-design 4/16. Vercel preview "failed to fetch user" NOT code bug: ZERO env vars configured on Vercel, MONGODB_URI missing. Affects all branches. User must add vars via Vercel dashboard. All pushed.
